underlying_goal: Refactor a Laravel Livewire product management system to treat products as proper domain entities throughout a multi-step wizard, and fix validation errors
friction_detail: Claude struggled extensively with a simple validation rule typo (max:1000 vs max:1000), attempting 20+ different approaches including sed, PHP scripts, tinker, and file recreation without reading the file properly
brief_summary: User wanted to fix a Livewire validation error and refactor product creation into a proper domain model wizard; validation error was eventually fixed after many failed attempts, but architectural refactor was not completed
